title: 柒婆三點半將會開記招宣布全港宵禁
remark:
[gold]⚠️ 管理團隊警示：本主題內容已被回報為「真實性有待確定，及可能含有虛假資訊」，請各位留意。[/gold]
警示措拖說明：https://lih.kg/eobQbT

replies.msg:
The Chief Executive will hold a press conference at 3:30 p.m., and take strict measures to prevent the spread of the virus. From midnight, all people will be blocked from entering and leaving Hong Kong. All restaurants and bars can only take out food, not all meals, all restaurants / shopping malls / super Markets / markets / shops, etc. are only open until 8 p.m., all public transportation agencies including buses and MTR are only available until 9 p.m., all overnight transportation will be suspended tonight.
From midnight, the Chief Executive authorizes all disciplined services personnel to include the Civil Aid Service and Auxiliary Medical Service, as well as civil servants of individual law enforcement agencies, including hawker management teams, to take enforcement actions.If someone does not comply with the relevant laws or violates isolation orders such as epidemic prevention orders, he will They will be arrested and prosecuted immediately for a period of 14 days.

The next seven days require all employers in Hong Kong to reduce the number and time of work and arrange at least half of their employees to work from home.

https://topick.hket.com/article/2599153/
【新冠肺炎】網傳縮短公共交通運作時間並安排一半人在家工作？ 政府消息：勿誤傳錯誤的訊息
網上流傳一段消息指，行政長官將於下午三時三十分舉行記者會，並採取嚴格措施防止病毒傳播，包括從午夜開始所有人將被禁止進出香港。政府消息人士指，有關訊息是虛構，呼籲市民勿誤傳。
有關訊息以英文撰寫，內容大致為：

行政長官將於下午三時三十分舉行記者會，並採取嚴格措施防止病毒傳播。從午夜開始，所有人將被禁止進出香港。所有餐廳和酒吧只能外賣，而不能全部用餐，所有餐廳/購物中心/超級市場/市場/商店等僅開放至晚上8點。所有公共交通機構（包括公交車和地鐵）僅開放至晚上9點，今晚所有通宵運輸將暫停。

從午夜開始，行政長官授權所有紀律部隊人員包括民政服務和輔助醫療服務人員，以及包括小販管理團隊在內的各個執法機構的公務員採取執法行動。相關法律或違反防疫令等隔離令，他將被逮捕並立即起訴，為期14天。 接下來的7天要求香港的所有僱主減少工作數量和時間，並安排至少一半的僱員在家工作。

政府消息人士指，有關訊息是虛構的，並沒有相關措施，呼籲市民勿散播錯誤的資訊。
搵鬼信

行政長官將於下午3時30分 召開記者會, 採取嚴厲措施防止病毒擴散,由午夜起,全面封關所有人不得進出香港, 所有餐廳酒吧只可以外賣不能堂食, 所有食肆/商場/超級市場/ 街市/商舖等每日只可營業至晚上八點, 所有公共交通機構包括巴士港鐵只能服務至晚上九時, 今晚開始 所有通宵交通工具暫停服務.
午夜起, 行政長官授權全數紀律部隊人員包括民眾安全服務隊及醫療輔助隊, 以及個別執法部門公務員, 包括小販管理隊採取執法行動, 如有人並沒有遵守相關法例或違反防疫令等隔離命令, 將會立即拘捕以及檢控,為期14日, 按需要再決定是否延長.

未來七日要求全港所有僱主減少上班人數及時間,最少安排一半員工在家工作.

The Chief Executive will hold a press conference at 3:30 p.m., and take strict measures to prevent the spread of the virus. From midnight, all people will be blocked from entering and leaving Hong Kong. All restaurants and bars can only take out food, not all meals, all restaurants / shopping malls / super Markets / markets / shops, etc. are only open until 8 p.m., all public transportation agencies including buses and MTR are only available until 9 p.m., all overnight transportation will be suspended tonight.
From midnight, the Chief Executive authorizes all disciplined services personnel to include the Civil Aid Service and Auxiliary Medical Service, as well as civil servants of individual law enforcement agencies, including hawker management teams, to take enforcement actions.If someone does not comply with the relevant laws or violates isolation orders such as epidemic prevention orders, he will They will be arrested and prosecuted immediately for a period of 14 days.

The next seven days require all employers in Hong Kong to reduce the number and time of work and arrange at least half of their employees to work from home.
